channel.title: Light on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Light on jamesm.blog

item.title: A Full Second of Stillness: How Physicists Pinned Light in Place
item.description: Researchers have held a pulse of light motionless for an entire second - a thousandfold leap over earlier records. Here is what that actually means, how it was done, and why it reshapes the future of quantum hardware.
